name: EPG Enricher
description: Enriches EPG programme data with TMDB artwork (posters, backdrops), genres and descriptions. Only processes channels that are mapped in your playlists, complementing existing Schedules Direct / Gracenote metadata where data is missing.

settings.label: Enrich programmes with TMDB data
settings.helper_text: Fetch posters, backdrops, genres and descriptions from TMDB for programmes that are missing artwork.

settings.label: TMDB search language
settings.helper_text: Language for TMDB searches (e.g. 'de-DE', 'en-US', 'fr-FR'). Leave empty to use the global TMDB language from general settings.

settings.label: Overwrite existing metadata
settings.helper_text: Replace existing artwork and descriptions even if the programme already has data (e.g. from Schedules Direct).

settings.label: Enrich missing categories/genres
settings.helper_text: Fill in missing genre/category from TMDB when the programme has none.

settings.label: Enrich missing descriptions
settings.helper_text: Fill in missing programme descriptions from TMDB.

settings.label: Enrich poster/icon artwork
settings.helper_text: Fetch poster images from TMDB and set them as the programme icon.

settings.label: Enrich backdrop images
settings.helper_text: Fetch backdrop (landscape) images from TMDB and add them to the programme images array.

settings.label: Map genres to Emby EPG colors
settings.helper_text: Normalize TMDB genres to Emby-compatible category names (e.g. Movie, News, Sports, Kids) so Emby can color-code programmes in its guide.

settings.label: Detect categories from title keywords
settings.helper_text: Detect Sports, News, Kids, and Documentary categories from programme titles when TMDB lookup fails. Only active when 'Map genres to Emby EPG colors' is also enabled.

settings.label: Auto-run after EPG cache generation
settings.helper_text: Automatically enrich EPG data whenever the cache is rebuilt.

settings.label: Limit auto-run to these playlists
settings.helper_text: Only enrich these playlists during auto-run. Leave empty to enrich all playlists.
